title: SamplingPitch Property
description: Specifies the degree to which contour points are thinned out.
notes: With regard to Contour objects, after tracing object contours, the number of contour points is reduced according to the SamplingPitch property value.  Increase the SamplingPitch value to reduce the number of contour points.  Further, note that if the ContourTolerance property value is low, the number of contour points may not be thinned out along certain segments in order to acquire an accurate trajectory for the work piece contour.  If unnecessary contour points are output, increase the ContourTolerance property value.
